notes: The Chords page now follows the scale you pick on the Fretboard (key, scale, and library root stay in sync), and chord shapes can be viewed three ways: classic diagram, a fretboard-style neck with colored note names and intervals, or guitar tab. The Fretboard gets a Tab toggle too - see the current exercise written out as tab, updating live with pattern, direction, and mode. NOTE: updating from 0.6.1 or older requires uninstalling the old app first (new signing key).
